metadata.description: Blink's internal plugin marketplace — on-brand HTML deliverables, demo setup helpers, and team productivity plugins.

plugins.name: blink-presentation
plugins.description: Blink's official on-brand HTML deliverable skill — presentations, reports, PRDs, BRDs, business docs, release notes. Runs a mandatory intake flow (intake, study, style, follow-ups, four leverage questions, build) and enforces Blink brand plus hard alignment rules.
